headline: Biogen’s Alzheimer’s Drug Leaves Questions Unanswered, and That’s a Problem
summary: The presentation on  Biogen’s  experimental Alzheimer’s treatment at a medical meeting Tuesday was supposed to boost confidence in its drug’s prospects.  Instead, Biogen stock is down 6%, to $197.  Tuesday’s presentation on the drug diranersen, at London’s Alzheimer’s Association International Conference, left attendees confused about what to conclude from Biogen’s Phase 2 study known as CELIA.

raw.headline: Biogen’s Alzheimer’s Drug Leaves Questions Unanswered, and That’s a Problem

Tuesday’s presentation on the drug diranersen, at London’s Alzheimer’s Association International Conference, left attendees confused about what to conclude from Biogen’s Phase 2 study known as CELIA.

headline: What Lilly's Peer-Beating Numbers Cost You
summary: In the world of big pharma, one company is both the star performer and the most expensive name on the marquee, forcing investors to ask if the price of admission is simply too high.

headline: Eli Lilly & Co. (NYSE:LLY) Passes Navellier’s High-Growth Screen on Strong Earnings and Sales Momentum
summary: Louis Navellier’s eight-rule growth investing framework identifies stocks with strong earnings momentum and efficiency. Eli Lilly (LLY) passes this screen, showing exceptional sales, earnings, and cash flow growth.
